charters.title: Spelling Bee Game
charters.objective: Build a custom web-based Spelling Bee game with a 5-minute timer and daily scoreboard, shareable via link.
charters.successCriteria: Playable game with daily puzzles, enforced 5-min timer, nickname-based leaderboard, scoring by word length + obscurity.

decisions.text: Web app format for max shareability
Design approved: Vanilla JS + Express + SQLite

risks.risk: Word list too large / too small
risks.mitigation: Test with multiple dictionaries, tune
Rate limiting, optional nickname validation
Algorithm tuning, difficulty testing

charters.title: Neural NeXus Website
charters.objective: Build a professional website for the Neural NeXus newsletter brand — landing page, about, newsletter signup, and Spelling Bee game integration.
charters.successCriteria: Fully externalized website on neuralnexus.press with newsletter signup, brand presence, and playable Spelling Bee game accessible to the public.

outstanding.text: Landing page with hero, about, topics

decisions.text: Website will integrate Spelling Bee game
Target: live for newsletter readers ASAP

risks.mitigation: Set up early, allow 24-48h
Test embed/redirect approach
MVP first, polish later

charters.title: Wordle Game
charters.objective: Build a daily Wordle word-guessing game for the Neural NeXus website. Same premium dark UI as Spelling Bee. New word every day, 6 guesses, color-coded feedback, shareable results.
charters.successCriteria: Playable at www.neuralnexus.press/wordle, daily word rotation, keyboard with color hints, share-friendly emoji grid, leaderboard integration.

charters.title: Substack to TikTok Pipeline
charters.phase: ⏸️ Paused — M1-M3 done, blocked on assets
charters.objective: Automated pipeline that converts Neural NeXus Substack posts into TikTok-ready short-form video content, designed to drive traffic back to Substack for subscriber growth.
charters.successCriteria: One Substack post → multiple TikTok-ready clips (30-90s), with hooks, captions, CTA overlay pointing to Substack. Minimal manual effort per post.
blockers: ElevenLabs voice clone needs David's voice sample + API key
Pexels API key for stock footage

outstanding.text: Voice — Clone David's voice via ElevenLabs.
Approval — David reviews and approves scripts before rendering.

decisions.text: CTA drives to Substack, not website
macOS Samantha TTS as interim voice

risks.mitigation: Human review step, David approves scripts before render
Test ElevenLabs vs stock voices early
Use royalty-free sources, Pexels/Pixabay
Study trending formats, iterate on hooks

risks.risk: Scope creep into full video production suite
risks.mitigation: Keep it Substack→TikTok only, not general purpose

charters.title: Mini Crossword
charters.objective: Build a daily mini crossword game for www.neuralnexus.press/crossword — a 5×5 grid with science/tech-themed clues, inspired by the NYT Mini. Quick to play (2-5 min), shareable results, daily rotation.

decisions.text: Words don't need to be science-themed

risks.mitigation: Pre-author puzzles manually, no auto-generation needed
Custom on-screen keyboard, suppress native
Curate science-themed words, review each puzzle

charters.title: SEO & Analytics Strategy
charters.objective: Transform neuralnexus.press from a static hub into a search-discoverable, traffic-generating asset that complements Substack — driving organic visitors to the newsletter, games, and David's brand.

outstanding.text: Internal linking between main site and Substack blog

risks.risk: Duplicate content penalty from Substack mirroring
risks.mitigation: Use canonical tags pointing to neuralnexus.press as primary

risks.risk: Low domain authority limits ranking potential
risks.mitigation: Focus on low-competition long-tail keywords first
Target "free daily [game]" long-tail, not head terms

risks.risk: SEO takes 3-6 months to show results
risks.mitigation: Set expectations; track leading indicators (impressions, indexed pages)
Consider Plausible/Umami as supplement

charters.title: Content Distribution Automation
charters.objective: Automate content distribution across social platforms from Substack posts.
charters.successCriteria: One-click distribution from Substack to social channels with tracking.

charters.title: Oral Supplementation
charters.objective: Design a personalized, evidence-based oral supplementation protocol targeting cognitive performance — memory, focus, processing speed, neuroprotection, and long-term brain health.
charters.successCriteria: - [ ] Literature review of top-tier nootropic compounds completed

outstanding.text: Novel pathways research (TrkB, σ1, mGluR5, PDE4/5, Nrf2)
Phase 1 supplements all arrived and started

decisions.text: Scope expanded to include off-label pharma + injectables + novel pathways

risks.mitigation: Full interaction check before starting; consult physician
Only recommend third-party tested brands (NSF/USP)
Use objective metrics where possible; blind self-testing
Tier system forces prioritization; start with Tier A only

risks.risk: Overcomplicated protocol leads to poor adherence
risks.mitigation: Keep daily stack ≤8 supplements; simple AM/PM split

charters.title: Cognitive Performance Dashboard
charters.objective: Build a longitudinal cognitive performance measurement system that combines standardized testing, chess ELO tracking, and Neural NeXus game analytics — with supplement/intervention phase markers — to objectively evaluate whether cognitive enhancement strategies are working.
charters.successCriteria: - [ ] Standardized cognitive battery built and deployed on neuralnexus.press

outstanding.text: Analytics with longitudinal charts + Cohen's d

decisions.text: Chess ELO as primary passive metric
Neural NeXus games as supplementary only
Standardized battery: dual n-back + PVT + DSST
2-week baseline required before any new intervention

risks.risk: Practice effects inflate standardized test scores
risks.mitigation: Use adaptive difficulty (n-back); track asymptote, not raw score
Keep battery under 3 min; gamify with streaks

risks.risk: Chess ELO influenced by non-cognitive factors (tilt, fatigue)
risks.mitigation: Large sample size per window; flag outlier sessions

risks.risk: Puzzle difficulty variance in NN games
risks.mitigation: 14-day rolling average; don't use for primary decisions
Pre-register expected effect before starting compound; blind analysis where possible

charters.title: Mobile Cognitive App (PWA)
charters.objective: Installable PWA with mobile-optimized cognitive tests, WHOOP summary, and Today view.
charters.successCriteria: PWA installable on iOS, mobile-optimized tests (PVT tap, DSST thumb grid, N-Back), service worker caching.

decisions.text: Telegram cron for reminders (iOS lacks Web Push)

programs.name: Treat Biosciences
programs.description: Canine therapeutic development — TRT-001 triple incretin agonist for canine obesity.

charters.title: Triple Incretin Program (TRT-001)
charters.phase: ⏸️ Paused — Research complete, awaiting David's decisions
charters.objective: Develop TRT-001, the first canine-optimized triple incretin agonist (GLP-1R/GIPR/GCGR) for canine obesity. 38 research documents produced. CNADA pathway to conditional approval.
charters.successCriteria: - [x] Competitive landscape analysis complete (updated 2026-03-19 with Okava, Teva generic, APOP)
blockers: CNADA vs full NADA pitch strategy undecided

outstanding.text: Competitive landscape (Okava, Akston, Vetigenics, Loyal, Invetx)
Development cost analysis v3 (CNADA $4.5-8M, Full NADA $7-13M)
Google Slides pitch deck v2 (12 slides)
MUMS Act analysis — does NOT qualify
Update pitch deck Slides 11/12 with v3 costs

risks.mitigation: Design diverse candidates; use proven scaffolds
David can do Phase 0 solo; recruit new team if needed
Multiple paths (accelerator + SBIR + angels + bootstrap)
Speed to patent + conditional approval
Re-file incorporation if needed ($500)

charters.title: Molluscum Contagiosum Treatment
charters.objective: Fully resolve molluscum contagiosum infection with combination of in-office cryotherapy and at-home imiquimod. Track treatment progress and clearance timeline.

risks.mitigation: Imiquimod catches subclinical lesions
Reduce frequency if needed; mild redness = working
Additional cryo sessions at follow-up
Immune system typically prevents reinfection

charters.title: Project Management System
charters.objective: Build a full-featured, browser-based project management dashboard that reads/writes charter files, tracks status, monitors deployed projects, and surfaces blockers — all from a single UI.
charters.successCriteria: Replaces the static charter index with a dynamic system that can filter, edit, search, and monitor all projects without touching markdown files manually.

decisions.text: Same dark theme as Neural NeXus

risks.risk: Markdown parsing breaks on edge cases
risks.mitigation: Strict charter template, validation on write
Single-user system, atomic writes

risks.risk: Scope creep into full PM tool
risks.mitigation: Stick to charter management, not task management

charters.title: Charter Dashboard
charters.objective: Persistent, browser-accessible dashboard to view and manage all project charters from any device on the local network.
charters.successCriteria: Dashboard accessible at a stable URL, survives reboots, displays all charters with live status, requires zero maintenance.

charters.title: Scientific Panel Architecture
charters.objective: Multi-model adversarial review panel: Curie (Opus) + GPT-5.4 challenger. Morpheus as arbiter.

outstanding.text: Implementation — agents paused pending PM framework

charters.title: Work Process Framework
charters.objective: Define end-to-end work process: task intake → planning → execution → verification → testing → shipping.

outstanding.text: QA gates defined per risk level

decisions.text: Lean org: Morpheus primary, Codex review gate
All agents paused until framework complete
